ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., TMUS, ATVI) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Telecommunication, Software) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the analyst belongs to */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as an analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "buy" INTEGER /* Number of buy ratings */,
  "outperform" INTEGER /* Number of outperform ratings */,
  "hold" INTEGER /* Number of hold ratings */,
  "underperform" INTEGER /* Number of underperform ratings */,
  "sell" INTEGER /* Number of sell ratings */,
  "no_opinion" INTEGER /* Number of no opinion ratings */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analyst's rating (e.g., 0.7) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mean_ratings" (
  "mean_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mean rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "mean_rating" REAL /* Current mean rating */,
  "prev_mean_rating" REAL /* Previous mean rating */,
  "mean_label" TEXT /* Label for the mean rating (e.g., Outperform, Hold) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the mean rating was updated */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings used to calculate the mean rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mean_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mean_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "rating_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history entry */,
  "mean_rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mean rating */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was updated */,
  "prev_mean_rating" REAL /* Previous mean rating */,
  "rating_change" REAL /* Change in rating (e.g., 0.1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_mean_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("mean_rating_id") REFERENCES mean_ratings ("mean_rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being tracked */,
  "add_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that split */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date the stock split occurred */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2:1) */,
  "split_type" TEXT /* Type of stock split (e.g., forward, reverse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock that paid the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend per share */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield (e.g., 2.5%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings_history" (
  "analyst_ratings_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst rating history entry */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was provided */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_ratings_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_history_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_history_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, rating update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
